docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING SET FOR DEC-20-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 218

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $553.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 3DDD CUSTOM, INC. DOHERTY, THOMAS W DOHERTY, KAREN
MINUTES FOR DEC-20-2001 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 218
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAR-01-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAN I STATUS CONFERENCE DATE: HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORP SERVED OCT-03-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 3DDD CUSTOM, INC. DOHERTY, THOMAS W DOHERTY, KAREN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 3DDD CUSTOM, INC. DOHERTY, THOMAS W DOHERTY, KAREN $38,879.15 PRINCIPAL, $3,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,022.40 INTEREST, $553.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,954.55, SEE SCANNED DOC. TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $43,954.55.
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2001, ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP GRANTED PER WRITTEN DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT. LORETTA NORRIS; D. CARTER, CLERK; LAVONNE GRANGER, CSR. SCD 218.
